sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الْكُسْكُسُ طَبَقًا رَئِيسِيًّا فِي الْمَطْبَخِ الْمَغْرِبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Kuskus je osnovno jelo marokanskog kuhinja.
sentences.translationEn: Couscous is a staple dish of Moroccan cuisine.

sentences.arabic: يُصْنَعُ مِنَ الْقَمْحِ الْمَطْحُونِ وَيُطْهَى بِالْبُخَارِ.
sentences.translation: Pravi se od mljevene pšenice i kuha na pari.
sentences.translationEn: It is made from ground wheat and cooked by steaming.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدَّمُ مَعَ الْخُضَارِ وَاللَّحْمِ فِي طَبَقٍ كَبِيرٍ مُشْتَرَكٍ.
sentences.translation: Servira se s povrćem i mesom u velikom zajedničkom tanjiru.
sentences.translationEn: It is served with vegetables and meat in a large shared dish.

sentences.translation: Porodica sjedi oko njega i jede zajedno.
sentences.translationEn: The family sits around it and eats together.

sentences.arabic: الْكُسْكُسُ لَيْسَ طَعَامًا فَقَطْ بَلْ هُوَ رَمْزٌ لِلتَّجَمُّعِ وَالْوَحْدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kuskus nije samo hrana već simbol zajedništva i sloge.
sentences.translationEn: Couscous is not just food but a symbol of togetherness and unity.
